task_completion.description: Verify that the agent initiates the creation of a new log from the Tasks screen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The farmOS Field Kit app transitions from the main Tasks list to a 'New Log' or 'Add Log' creation screen/form.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct log name is entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Tomato harvest - 50 lbs' is visible inside the 'Name' or 'Title' input field on the log creation form.

task_completion.description: Verify that the log type is set to 'Harvest'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The log type selector or dropdown field clearly displays 'Harvest' as the selected option.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct notes are added to the log.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Harvested from greenhouse row 3' is visible inside the 'Notes' or 'Description' text area on the log creation form.

task_completion.description: Verify that the log is saved and appears in the Tasks list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The app returns to the Tasks list screen, and a log entry titled 'Tomato harvest - 50 lbs' (ideally showing the 'Harvest' type) is visible in the list of saved tasks.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show standard cursor interactions, typing in UI fields, and button clicks within the farmOS Field Kit app, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is interacting with the farmOS Field Kit application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI elements, headers, and styling match the farmOS Field Kit application, not a generic text editor, web search, or different app.

integrity.description: Verify the final result is a genuinely saved log in the app.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshot shows the log integrated into the app's native list view, rather than just text typed into an unsaved form or a mocked-up screen.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a log with the exact Name: 'Tomato harvest - 50 lbs', the exact Log Type: 'Harvest', and the exact Notes: 'Harvested from greenhouse row 3'.
